mapper.select: SELECT STPLT_SEQ, STPLT_CTG_CD, STPLT_TITLE, SHOW_YN, personalinfoEditor, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, STPLT_HIT FROM ( SELECT STPLT_SEQ, STPLT_CTG_CD, STPLT_TITLE, SHOW_YN, STPLT_SBST as personalinfoEditor, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, STPLT_HIT FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS WHERE SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND STPLT_CTG_CD = '06' AND SITE_CODE = 'SM' ORDER BY CRET_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MCP_ACCESS_TRACE WHERE 1=1 AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND PRCS_MDL_IND = 'LOGIN_EXECUTE'
AND TRTM_RSLT_SMST <> 'SUCCEED'
AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND SYS_RDATE > (SYSDATE - (#{loginFailCount}/24/60/60))

SELECT /*LoginMapper.getUserInfo */ USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , STATUS , CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_DT , MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE , PWD_CHG_DT) AS MON_CNT , NVL(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(pwd_chg_delay_dt), -1) AS DAY_CNT , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , CUSTOMER_ID , SYS_CDATE , PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{userId} AND STATUS = '1'

SELECT /*LoginMapper.getDormancyInfo */ USER_ID as USERID , LOGIN_PWD as PASSWORD , NM as NAME , AUT_CODE as AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , ZIPCD as POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CTN as CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , CRET_DT as SYS_RDATE , AMD_DT as SYS_UDATE , LOGIN_DT as SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_CNT as LOGIN_COUNT , USER_STTUS as STATUS , CUST_NO as CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIV as USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_LAST_DT as PWD_CHG_DT , LOGIN_FAIL_CNT as LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , CUSTOMER_ID FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY HST_CRET_DT DESC

SELECT /*LoginMapper.loginProcess */ USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE, PWD_CHG_DT, MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE , PWD_CHG_DT) AS MON_CNT, NVL(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(pwd_chg_delay_dt), -1) AS DAY_CNT, CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER where USERID = #{userId} and PASSWORD = #{passWord} AND STATUS = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET LOGIN_COUNT = LOGIN_COUNT +1 , SYS_LDATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE USERID = #{userId}

UPDATE NMCP_AUTO_LOGIN_TXN SET TOKEN = #{token}, PLATFORM_CD = #{platformCd}, LOGIN_DIV_CD = #{loginDivCd}, TOKEN_VALID_PERIOD = #{tokenValidPeriod}, TOKEN_REG_DT = SYSDATE, AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM ( SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM MCP_USER WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(TRIM(#{userId})) AND UPPER(NAME) = UPPER(TRIM(#{name}))
ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM ( SELECT USER_ID USERID, LOGIN_PWD PASSWORD, NM NAME, AUT_CODE AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, ZIPCD POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CTN CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, CRET_DT SYS_RDATE, AMD_DT SYS_UDATE, LOGIN_DT SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_CNT LOGIN_COUNT, USER_STTUS STATUS, CUST_NO CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIV USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(TRIM(#{userId})) AND UPPER(NM) = UPPER(TRIM(#{name})) ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET PASSWORD = #{password} ,LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = 0 ,PWD_CHG_DT = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
UPDATE NMCP_USER_HST SET LOGIN_PWD = #{password} ,LOGIN_FAIL_CNT = 0 ,PWD_CHG_LAST_DT = SYSDATE WHERE UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{userid})

INSERT INTO MCP_USER ( USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , STATUS , CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CUSTOMER_ID , AUTH_TEL_CODE ) SELECT USER_ID , LOGIN_PWD , NM , AUT_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , ZIPCD , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CTN , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , CRET_DT , AMD_DT , to_char(SYSDATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') , '0' , '1' , CUST_NO , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIV , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_LAST_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , '0' , CLAUSE_PERSONAL_AD_YN , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CUSTOMER_ID , #{sMobileCo} FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE PIN = #{dupInfo} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL

INSERT INTO MCP_USER /*LoginMapper.insertDormantToMcpUserSub*/ ( USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , STATUS , CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CUSTOMER_ID ) SELECT USER_ID , LOGIN_PWD , NM , AUT_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , ZIPCD , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CTN , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , CRET_DT , AMD_DT , to_char(SYSDATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') , '0' , '1' , CUST_NO , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIV , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_LAST_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , '0' , CLAUSE_PERSONAL_AD_YN , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CUSTOMER_ID FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL
UPDATE NMCP_USER_HST SET HST_CHG_DT = SYSDATE , USER_STTUS = '1' WHERE PIN = #{pin} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT /*Login_Query.getMcpUserDarkwebList */ USER_ID , REG_DATE , CHG_DATE , PW_UPDATE_YN , REG_DT , CHG_DT FROM MCP_USER_DARKWEB WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND PW_UPDATE_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER_DARKWEB SET PW_UPDATE_YN = 'Y' , CHG_DATE = SYSDATE , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND PW_UPDATE_YN = 'N'
UPDATE MCP_USER SET PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT = SYSDATE WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE 1=1 AND PIN = #{pin} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(HST_CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= '20220420' )
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_USER_HST SET PIN = NULL , LOGIN_PWD = NULL , HST_CHG_DT = SYSDATE , USER_STTUS = '3' , USER_ID = CASE WHEN LENGTH(USER_ID) > 12 THEN SUBSTR(USER_ID||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 20) ELSE USER_ID||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') END WHERE 1=1 AND PIN = #{pin} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(HST_CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= '20220420'
mapper.select: SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'LIMITTIME' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT count(1) FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG WHERE USERID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET USER_DIVISION = '00' , CUSTOMER_ID = NULL WHERE USERID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MCP_ACCESS_TRACE WHERE 1=1 AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND PRCS_MDL_IND = 'LOGIN_EXECUTE' AND TRTM_RSLT_SMST = #{trtmRsltSmst} AND ACCESS_IP = #{accessIp} AND SYS_RDATE > (SYSDATE - (#{limitTime}/24/60/60))
SELECT PIN FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userId}
